response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: observed intro, news, musical performance, and outro. 2. Identified song title 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' and credits from on-screen text. 3. Searched for song credits to verify official lyrics. As it is an original Hololive song without public lyrics, I transcribed the lyrics directly from the video audio. 4. Created scene objects based on distinct segments. 5. Formatted output into required JSON.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for the VTuber group 'Justice' from Hololive, featuring a news-style introduction followed by a full musical performance of their original song 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL'.

scenes.description: The video begins with an intro on a vintage TV, followed by a live-action talk segment and a news update from Ouro Kronii.
A full live performance of the song 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' by the group Justice. On-screen credits identify the music creators.
scenes.performer_in_video: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Cecilia Immergreen, Raora Panthera, Gigi Murin
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Yeah
Are you there?
You're a SUPER GIRL
(JUSTICE JUST LIKE THAT)
(JUSTICE GET GET THAT)
If you're feeling trapped, send out a signal right above!
We'll find you, set you free then you can sign up for the club!
Danger, fun fun fun
Soul shine like the sun
(Minna happiness, Minna happiness)
Soul shine like the sun
The frig? I'm big! My strong strong muscle
They see me run, it's no miracle
You are shining SO BRIGHT!
Do your dancing LET'S FIGHT!
You can be a SUPER SUPER GIRL
I'm the SUPER!
Hey! DUPER!
SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL
Come sing with us, beating villains for fun <3 it
Put on your antennas, get your super girl fit
I always want a pizza, stack those fries up to the sky
You lot say whatcha think about us hittin' town tonight?
(JUSTICE!)
Feeling happy time, no sad, say bye bye
So stomp, stomp, stomp your feet to this beat
Cuz we are space, no no gravity!
You are shining SO BRIGHT!
Do your dancing LET'S FIGHT!
You can be a SUPER SUPER GIRL
I'm the SUPER!
Hey! DUPER!
SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL
I know you're feeling so super bad
You don't have depression, you're just super sad
We are change the world, that's hope!
If you doubt, hope you explode!
Justice loud, Justice proud
And we keep telling you!
We are SUPER!
Hey! DUPER!
SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL
Justice we are Justice, make the baddies go boom!
Come on, come on, baby, rocket ship to the moon!
I'm the SUPER!
Hey! DUPER!
SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL
